text:
Market today: Tech is still the driver, but volatility is high. SpaceX joining the Nasdaq adds another layer of unpredictability, which amplifies your margin risk.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL/TRIM candidate at -23.52% and above its stop. SPAL is also a concern, down -11.17% as a new, volatile leveraged ETF.

Watch: The market is reacting to news flow, especially around tech and AI. Keep an eye on how these headlines impact your concentrated tech book.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions closely, especially SOXL, given the current market chop.
plays: SOXL: Trim or exit this leveraged position. It's down significantly and carries decay risk.
SPAL: Monitor this new leveraged position closely. Consider adjusting stop if volatility remains high.
